overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a sunlit historic plaza modeled after Place de la Concorde in Paris. The character walks a circular path around a large central fountain and an Egyptian obelisk, surrounded by classical stone buildings and ornate lampposts under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic plaza with central tiered fountain

events.description: character begins walking away from the fountain across the cobblestone plaza

agents.ego_description: character starts walking away from the fountain, heading toward the open plaza

entered.detail: large green and gold three-tiered fountain with statues around the base
black cast iron street lamps lining the plaza perimeter
grand historic stone buildings with columns and ornate facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character standing before an elaborate tiered fountain in a sunlit historic plaza. After a brief pause, the character begins walking away from the fountain across the cobblestone surface, with classical buildings and ornate lampposts visible in the distance.

events.description: fountain passes out of view behind as the tall obelisk becomes the dominant central landmark

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the Egyptian obelisk monument in the plaza center

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings and gold capstone

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the open cobblestone plaza toward a towering Egyptian obelisk that dominates the center of the square. The fountain falls behind and out of view as the obelisk grows larger in the frame, with classical buildings framing the background on both sides.

events.description: the tiered fountain reappears in the distance ahead as the character rounds the obelisk area

agents.ego_description: walking along the plaza edge with the obelisk now behind and buildings lining the left side

entered.detail: the same green and gold fountain now seen from the opposite side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having passed the obelisk, the character continues walking along the plaza perimeter with the monument now behind. The classical stone buildings remain prominent on the left, and the tiered fountain gradually comes back into view in the distance as the character completes the arc around the square.

events.description: character begins circling around the fountain to view it from different angles

agents.ego_description: approaching the fountain and walking around its perimeter to view the ornate statues and tiers from multiple angles

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the fountain, approaching it from the opposite side of the initial view. Walking around the fountain's perimeter, the camera captures the ornate green and gold structure from various angles before the character continues past it, leaving the fountain behind as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character walks a circular path through a sunlit historic plaza, transitioning from a tiered fountain to a towering obelisk and back again. It begins with the character standing before an elaborate fountain before they turn and walk across the cobblestone surface toward the center of the square. As the fountain recedes from view, the camera tracks the character toward a dominating Egyptian obelisk that grows larger in the frame, flanked by classical stone buildings. The scene then shifts as the character passes the monument and continues along the perimeter, with the obelisk falling behind and the tiered fountain gradually reappearing in the distance. Finally, the character completes the arc by approaching the fountain from the opposite side, circling its ornate green and gold structure before moving past it to leave the plaza center behind.
